subcodes.first_line: O ye steadfast in the Covenant! God be praised that ye have succeeded in establishing a school in Mihdíyabad and are, with great energy and enthusiasm, engaged in educating the children.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتان بر پیمان الحمد لله موفق بآن شدید که در مهدی آباد تاسیس مدرسه تربیت
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @universal education, @call to action, @praise and encouragement
